title: papaver rhoeas subsp. obtusifolium
intro: Papaver rhoeas subsp. obtusifolium, also known as the European poppy, is a subspecies of the common poppy plant that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used for centuries in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues such as pain, insomnia, and anxiety. The health benefits of Papaver rhoeas subsp. obtusifolium include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve sleep quality, and act as a natural sedative. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and teas, which are often used to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of stress and anxiety.
